description: Create a three-column content slide on consumer survey clusters with mini vertical bar charts and bullet lists for EV Owners, EV prospects, and EV sceptics across regions.

header.kicker: Consumer survey – Clusters and investigation areas
header.headline: Consumers have been grouped into 3 main clusters within 4 regions: EV Owners, EV prospects and EV sceptics

steps.label: EV Owners
steps.sub: People who currently own an EV

steps.label: EV prospects
steps.sub: People who have declared their intention to buy an EV in the next 5 years

steps.label: EV sceptics
steps.sub: People who have no intention to buy an EV in the next 5 years

items.text: EV Owners size by region: Total 6%, APAC 7%, EMEA 7%, NA 5%, LATAM 4%
items.sub: Focus areas: EV Owners profile; Customer journey and usage habits. Outcome: Best practices and lessons learnt to be leveraged to define EV specific customer journeys.

items.text: EV prospects size by region: Total 62%, APAC 63%
items.sub: Focus areas and outcome not fully visible in provided HTML.

items.text: EV sceptics cluster shown as third panel
items.sub: Detailed values, focus areas, and outcome not fully visible in provided HTML.
